base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of summons — a effect_layer (summon_vfx) from 1991 final fantasy iv. Summon creature animations — Chocobo/Mist Dragon/Shiva/Ifrit/Ramuh/Titan/Leviathan/Odin/Asura/Bahamut/Goblin/Bomb/Cockatrice. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
